description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The Treasury Bill Rate is, as of any date of determination, the yield (expressed as an annual rate) on United States Treasury Bills having a maturity of ninety-one (91) days (or, if no such maturity is available, such other maturity as the United States Department of the Treasury shall designate as comparable), as published by the United States Department of the Treasury in its

(or any successor publication or source designated by the United States Department of the Treasury or, if unavailable, by the Federal Reserve). If such rate is not published on the relevant date, the Treasury Bill Rate shall be the most recently published rate prior to that date.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
